key.name: show-confirmation-dialog
key.description: When enabled, a dialog will ask for confirmation before removing any application.

key.name: show-package-type-in-dialog
key.summary: Show package type in confirmation dialog

key.name: enable-for-flatpak
key.summary: Enable uninstall option for Flatpak apps

key.name: enable-for-snap
key.summary: Enable uninstall option for Snap apps

key.name: enable-for-apt
key.summary: Enable uninstall option for APT/dpkg apps

key.name: blocked-apps
key.summary: Additional app IDs the user has manually protected
